column2: Test Case - Request Complete Recorded Evidence for Incident Investigation
column3: ['The CAA flight safety investigator logs in to the system. ', 'The CAA flight safety investigator requests complete recorded evidence for an incident investigation. ', "The system generates a DPIA along with MOR obligations in response to the user's request. "]
column4: ['The user is successfully authenticated and granted access to the system. ', 'The request is accepted by the system, as indicated by a confirmation message or successful processing status. ', 'Upon successful completion of the request, the system produces and delivers both a DPIA (Data Protection Impact Assessment) and MOR (Minimum Obligations for Reporting) obligations. ']
